# TranscriptX

> TranscriptX converts video/audio into transcripts and repurposed content for SEO and publishing workflows.

## Canonical
- https://transcriptx.xyz/

## Key pages
- https://transcriptx.xyz/
- https://transcriptx.xyz/pricing
- https://transcriptx.xyz/profile-links
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/repurpose-video-into-seo-post
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/manual-vs-ai-transcription
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/youtube-transcript-generator
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/video-to-transcript
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/download-youtube-transcript
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/audio-to-transcript
- https://transcriptx.xyz/guides/youtube-video-to-transcript

## Product scope
- Upload media and generate AI transcript output
- Transform transcripts into reusable written content
- Manage profile links and publishing-related flows

## Access policy for agents
- Public website pages can be read and summarized
- Do not attempt authenticated actions or admin routes
- Respect robots.txt and legal policies

## Contact
- https://transcriptx.xyz/
